name: LinkedIn/Instagram Profile Setup Service
description: Done-for-you setup or optimization of LinkedIn and Instagram profiles for companies/startups with missing or weak social presence.
niche: Startups and small companies without professional LinkedIn/Instagram presence
notes: Score: 58/80 conditional GO. Main risk: profile setup alone may be too low-ticket unless packaged with positioning, content starter kit, and recurring posting/system support.

name: Credibility Launch System
description: 72-hour credibility rebuild for founder-led B2B service firms with decent websites but weak LinkedIn/social presence.
niche: Founder-led B2B service firms with weak LinkedIn presence
notes: Score: 61/80 conditional GO. Position as perceived legitimacy and trust, not profile setup. Best as entry offer/wedge into outbound system. Price test: Lite £500-£700, Core £1,000-£1,800, content add-on £500-£1,000/mo.
